BRlClIc;J;[f * IJ1 3ilR -- 2 of 5 -- I ~fTlTIll _<:§lll6 4 ] 3 rI I I I <Rt"IM2;~1cF ~ I QG1=2.f CDr ~ chcA-qlfz4i c)J ~I JlIJl(>j'i Jt ~ (chll1iCfl) I 4. ~ Cfl(4ql~<11 ell ~ ~ fclRl<OlJll em- ~ ~ : ~ fclFci<Ol<R fulm m 3fCJ~llfkil\<RCfl, .wfrc;r <:IT ~m Cfll4ql~lfl c);- ~ c>lTJI.~ldl cf:rr ~ ~ WFTl ~ 3-tR Fv1c1lH (i ~ "J fll { fciuP:r ~ 011 Q Jill ~ mcfiT{, ctll'~cnIJJ ~ [jc:j~1 q'"l lII/4/163/12/dim.] PRASAR BHARATI (Broadcasting Corporation of India) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 19th November, 2012 No.A-lOIl7812012-P~C._ In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 33 read with sub-section (4) of section 11 of the Prasar Bharati (Broadcasting Corporation of India) Act, 1990 (25 of 1990), the Corporation hereby makes the following regulations, namely:- 1. Short Title and Commencement: (1) These regulations may be called the Prasar Bharati (Broadcasting Corporation of India), Authorities for Disciplinary Proceedings Regulations, 2012. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official I Gazette. 2. Disciplinary Proceedings: The provrsrons of the Central Civil Services (Conduct) Rules, 1964 and the Central Civil Services (Classifications, Control and Appeal) Rules, 1965 shall be applicable in respect of disciplinary proceedings against the officers and employees referred to in sub-section (1) and sub-section (2) of section 11 of the Prasar Bharati Act, 1990. -- 3 of 5 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA. EXTRAORDINARY [PART fIT-SEC. 4] 3. Authorities for disciplinary proceedings: The Disciplinary Authority specified in column (3) of the table given below, the Appellate Authority specified in the corresponding entry in column (4) of the said table, and the Reviewing Authority specified in the corresponding entry in column (5) thereof shall be the authorities for disciplinary proceedings and shall exercise their respective powers to impose minor and major penalties, except the power to impose major penalty of compulsory retirement, or removal, or dismissal from service in respect of the classification of posts specified against corresponding entries under column (2) of the said table. TABLE I S.No. Classification Disciplinary authority Appellate Reviewing of posts Authority Authority f- GROUP 'A' Executive Member of the A Committee Prasar Bharati 1 Prasar Bharati Board consisting of the Board I Chairman, the Member (Finance) and Member (Personnel) of the Prasar Bharati I Board 2 GROUP 'B' Director General Executive A Committee (Akashvani) or Director Member of the consisting of the General (Doordarshan) Prasar Bharati Chairman, the or Member (Personnel) Board Member (Finance) of the Prasar Bharati and Member Board in respect of (Personnel) of the officers and employees Prasar Bharati posted in Akashvani, Board Doordarshan and Prasar , Bharati Board Secretariat, as the case may be. 3 GROUP '(' (il Station Head/Kendra (i) Regional Director General I AND GROUP Head of the level of Additional (Akashvani) or I '0' Senior Time Scale or Director-General Director General above in case of concerned in case (Doordarshan) in employees posted at of employees respect of Stations/Kendras posted at employees posted I Stations/Kendras in Akashvani or I .. Doordarshan, as I -- 4 of 5 -- ·, '. -, .TlT ITJ---@uo 4 J 5 i {iii An officer of the level of Senior Time Scale or above in case of all other I establishments of Prasar I Bharati. I I I iI I , {iii Concerned I the case may be. I i officer of the level Member I of Additional I (Personnel) in I Director General respect of in case of all other I employees poste~ I establishments of in Prasar Bharatr I I Prasar Bharati, Secretariat. I 4. Application of these regulations to pending proceedings. These regulations shall be applicable to any disciplinary, appellate or review proceedings as on the date on which these regulations come into force and shall be decided accordingly.
